ignoreCommand: bash -c 'if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then exit 1; fi; if git diff --quiet "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" HEAD -- . ":(exclude)website-next" ":(exclude)docs" ":(exclude)*.md" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; else exit 1; fi'

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self' https://lock.show https://www.lock.show; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://www.google-analytics.com https://region1.google-analytics.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; form-action 'self'; frame-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; worker-src 'self' blob:; upgrade-insecure-requests
